Text.text: Automate employee offers, contracts, leave, payroll, timesheets, and expenses with a self-service portal. Empower your workforce with seamless, error-free HR operations anytime, anywhere.
Simplify invoicing with automated MSA, NDA, SOW, quotations, PO, and contract invoices. Ensure accuracy, compliance, and faster payments with real-time tracking.
Track, assign, and manage all company assets in one place. Gain complete visibility and control over asset usage and lifecycle.
Streamline hiring with easy job postings, applications, and interview scheduling. Attract and onboard the right talent quickly and efficiently.
Manage automobile schemes and quotations with automation and precision. Save time, reduce errors, and keep your business running smoothly..

We are efficient resource provider of SAP to deliver exceptional recruitment, services providing end-to-end hiring solutions that align with our clients goals, enabling them to build strong and capable teams

Kalpavriksha Technologies is a leading recruitment service provider, We specialize in extensive experience in SAP, Java, Salesforces with a proven track record of delivering high-quality recruitment solutions, we help businesses thrive by sourcing the right talent.
Executive Search: Finding top-level leaders and executives to drive growth.
Talent Mapping and Sourcing: Proactively identifying and engaging with high potential talent.
Candidate Screening and Assessment: Rigorous vetting for skill and cultural fit, we screening the profile take one round of interview to make sure it a best fit.
